source: Regularizing Matrix Factorization with User and Item Embeddings for Recommendation

concepts.finding: Regularizes MF with item embeddings learned from item co-occurrence (via word2vec-style SGNS). Additional regularization term brings item MF factors closer to their co-occurrence embeddings. Combines explicit feedback (ratings) with implicit structure (co-occurrence). Outperforms MF and pure co-occurrence embeddings on rating prediction.
concepts.implication: Regularize keyword-intent MF with keyword co-occurrence embeddings: bring keyword MF factors toward their co-occurrence embedding vectors. Keyword-keyword co-occurrence structure informs keyword-intent MF. Hybrid of explicit (observed keyword-intent pairs) and implicit (keyword-keyword co-occurrence) signals.
concepts.open_question: What regularization strength between keyword MF factors and co-occurrence embeddings optimizes keyword-intent prediction?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: A regularized MF model (combining keyword-intent MF loss with keyword embedding similarity regularization) outperforms both pure MF and pure embedding similarity for keyword-intent scoring.
